---
title: "Overcoming car dependence: Review of “The car dependent societya European perspective”"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2014). Overcoming car dependence: Review of “The car dependent societya European perspective”. *Environment and Planning B-Planning and Design*."
date: "2014-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_overcoming_2014"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Environment and Planning B-Planning and Design"
doi: ""
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Environment and Planning B-Planning and Design
**Year:** 2014

[BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2014). Overcoming car dependence: Review of “The car dependent societya European perspective”. *Environment and Planning B-Planning and Design*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_overcoming_2014,
  title = {Overcoming Car Dependence: {{Review}} of ``{{The}} Car Dependent Society{\textendash}a {{European}} Perspective''},
  author = {Lovelace, Robin},
  year = {2014},
  journal = {Environment and Planning B-Planning and Design},
  volume = {41},
  number = {5},
  pages = {948--949},
  issn = {0265-8135},
  copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
  keywords = {Book review}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
